text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Mile Championship is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our strategy is to clinch the title of Umamusume
of the Year by overpowering the competition with
Taiki Shuttle's sheer power and speed. However...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I want a redo, a reprise, and a rematch! I'm
beating Suzuka next time for sure!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh... That's the spirit, El Condor Pasa.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
However, even should you best Suzuka, I won't be
giving up the top seat to you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Remember, the peak of the Japan Cup is none
other than the throne of the Empress!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No, it's the perch for the Phantom Bird! I won't
lose to you—ever!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
This year's Twinkle Series is shaping up to be very
exciting.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. This time around, we have Grass Wonder,
El Condor Pasa, and Taiki Shuttle—the current
sprinter champion.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention Silence Suzuka, who's really been
knocking it out of the park recently.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Since returning from Hong Kong, her winning
streak has shown no sign of ending! Even with top
runners as her opponents!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
If she claims first place in the Japan Cup, the title
of Umamusume of the Year is practically hers for
the taking.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
What if the winner turns out to be El Condor Pasa
or Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Well... I presume the title will go to whoever wins,
right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle has won all her G1 races so far. If
she places first in the Mile Championship, she'll
secure a fantastic record in the G1 sprints.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, I doubt Silence Suzuka's momentum will
let up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There must be something else Taiki can do to
attain the honor of being Umamusume of the
Year...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Hey there! I just took a lap 'round the track!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Gosh, Trainer. Why the long face? Are ya feelin'
blue?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I choose to believe in Taiki Shuttle's potential. I
won't doubt her ever again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm prepared to consider every option for the
chance of grasping onto even a single glimmer of
hope.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Well, if ya say you're all right, then okay!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Sorry, Trainer, but can we finish up here for
today?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeppers! Somebody wants to see me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: And that somebody is Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Suzukaaa! Sorry I'm late!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hi, Taiki. It's okay. Thank you for coming.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You're more than welcome! ♪ Now then...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What'd ya wanna talk about?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Well, you see...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Do you remember last year's Mile Championship?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Of course! We ran in it together! Boy, that was
one exciting race!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes. I can't seem to forget it either.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I ever will. It's burned into my
memory.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Taiki... Your speed is still so vivid in my mind.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't stop chasing the speed you showed me
that day... and the shadow you left behind.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I decided to stop holding back when I run. I've
stayed at top speed since then, race after
race—so that one day I could catch up to your
shadow.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And yet, running at full speed hasn't been
enough. Your shadow is still there in front of me!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: So... Taiki.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I want to challenge you at the next Mile
Championship.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Championship?! But aren't ya supposed
to run in the Japan Cup?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Not anymore. I can't keep chasing after your
shadow!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I... want to go beyond it. I want to see the scenery
that lies beyond your top speed.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That's all I wanted to say.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Let's meet again on the track, Taiki.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle relays the conversation back to me.
Finding out that Silence Suzuka has declared war
is shocking, to say the least...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hmm. Trainer, I've been chewin' it over...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And I reckon this is a huge chance for me!
Whaddya think?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka is currently the top-ranked
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Butting heads with her in a G1 race is nothing
short of an enormous challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, should Taiki Shuttle come out of the
battle victorious...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This could be an opportunity to overthrow
Silence Suzuka's hold on everyone's hearts using
Taiki's power and speed!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen Suzuka burnin' so brightly. She
was intense.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I could tell all that talk about catchin' up and
overtaking me was coming straight from the
heart.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But I don't plan on losin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
There can only be one King of the Mile! And only
one Umamusume of the Year!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna claim both titles with these legs of
mine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle's chances of becoming Umamusume
of the Year hinge on the results of the Mile
Championship!
